## Runtime.IRuntimeIngredient.isAlcohol() method

Returns true if this is an alcohol ingredient. When true, alcohol-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isAlcohol(): this is IRuntimeAlcoholIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IRuntimeAlcoholIngredient](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimealcoholingredient.md)
